description: In flock of Canada Geese, initially noted due to small size; zoomed in with scope to see a bird with entirely black head, neck, and chest except white "necklace" on throat that looked complete (though can not exclude small break). Back nearly equally dark as head/neck/chest. Black on chest extending onto belly, narrowing and fading posteriorly towards legs. Broad side patches. Bill black and relatively small for goose. Vent white. Legs dark, probably blackBehaviors: walking among flock of (mainly) Lesser Canada GeeseCall: not heardPlumage: not determined
